title: loadhigh - Load program into upper memory
description: loadhigh: Load program into upper memory (requires `xms=true`, `umb=true`). (Load program into upper memory)

title: keyb - Set layout
description: keyb: Change keyboard layout. (Set layout)

title: cd - Go to the specified directory
description: cd: Change the current working directory. (Go to the specified directory)

title: cd - Go up to the parent of the current directory
description: cd: Change the current working directory. (Go up to the parent of the current directory)

title: cd - Go to the root directory of the current drive
description: cd: Change the current working directory. (Go to the root directory of the current drive)

title: exit - Exit DOSBox
description: exit: Exit DOSBox. (Exit DOSBox)

title: mixer - Display current volumes
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (Display current volumes)

title: mixer - Set master volume (left:right percentages)
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (Set master volume (left:right percentages))

title: mixer - Set Sound Blaster volume in decibels
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (Set Sound Blaster volume in decibels)

title: mixer - Set GUS left channel only
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (Set GUS left channel only)

title: mixer - Set volumes without displaying result
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (Set volumes without displaying result)

title: mixer - List available MIDI devices (Windows only)
description: mixer: Display/set sound levels. (List available MIDI devices (Windows only))

title: md - Create directory
description: md: Make a directory. (Create directory)

title: choice - Prompt for yes/no
description: choice: Wait for keypress and set `ERRORLEVEL` in batch scripts. (Prompt for yes/no)

title: imgmount - Mount floppy
description: imgmount: Mount disk or CD-ROM images. (Mount floppy)

title: imgmount - Mount CD-ROM
description: imgmount: Mount disk or CD-ROM images. (Mount CD-ROM)

title: copy - Copy a file
description: copy: Copy files. (Copy a file)

title: cls - Clear the screen resetting colors to white on black
description: cls: Clear the screen and reset colors. (Clear the screen resetting colors to white on black)

title: del - Delete a file
description: del: Delete one or more files. (Delete a file)

title: del - Delete all files matching a pattern
description: del: Delete one or more files. (Delete all files matching a pattern)

title: dir - List current directory
description: dir: List files and directories. (List current directory)

title: dir - Pause per page
description: dir: List files and directories. (Pause per page)

title: dir - Wide view
description: dir: List files and directories. (Wide view)

title: chdir - View documentation for the original command
description: chdir: This command is an alias of `CD`. (View documentation for the original command)

title: config - Write current config to file (local drive)
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Write current config to file (local drive))

title: config - Write current language strings to file
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Write current language strings to file)

title: config - Enable secure mode (disables MOUNT/IMGMOUNT/BOOT)
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Enable secure mode (disables MOUNT/IMGMOUNT/BOOT))

title: config - Set a property (e.g., CPU cycles)
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Set a property (e.g., CPU cycles))

title: config - Set property (e.g., disable EMS)
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Set property (e.g., disable EMS))

title: config - Get property value (stored in %CONFIG%)
description: config: Change or query DOSBox settings at runtime; save configs/languages. (Get property value (stored in %CONFIG%))

title: mount - Mount current directory as C
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount current directory as C)

title: mount - Mount specific directory as C
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount specific directory as C)

title: mount - Mount with free space limit (MB)
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount with free space limit (MB))

title: mount - Mount floppy drive
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount floppy drive)

title: mount - Mount CD-ROM drive
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount CD-ROM drive)

title: mount - Mount CD with extra options
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Mount CD with extra options)

title: mount - Unmount drive
description: mount: Mount host directories/drives/images as virtual DOS drives. (Unmount drive)

title: ipxnet - Start IPX server (default UDP port 213)
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Start IPX server (default UDP port 213))

title: ipxnet - Start server on specific port
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Start server on specific port)

title: ipxnet - Connect client to server IP
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Connect client to server IP)

title: ipxnet - Connect with specific port
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Connect with specific port)

title: ipxnet - Check network status
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Check network status)

title: ipxnet - Ping to test speed/clients
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Ping to test speed/clients)

title: ipxnet - Disconnect client
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Disconnect client)

title: ipxnet - Stop server (after clients disconnect)
description: ipxnet: Emulate IPX networking for multiplayer games (client-server model). (Stop server (after clients disconnect))

title: mem - Display free memory
description: mem: Display free memory info. (Display free memory)

title: loadfix - Start a program with 64KB allocated memory
description: loadfix: Reduce available conventional memory for old programs (default: 64KB). (Start a program with 64KB allocated memory)

title: loadfix - Load with custom KB reduction (1-1024)
description: loadfix: Reduce available conventional memory for old programs (default: 64KB). (Load with custom KB reduction (1-1024))

title: loadfix - Free all previously allocated memory
description: loadfix: Reduce available conventional memory for old programs (default: 64KB). (Free all previously allocated memory)

title: path - Display the current search path
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Display the current search path)

title: path - Set the semicolon-separated list of directories to search in
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Set the semicolon-separated list of directories to search in)

title: path - Append a directory to the search path
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Append a directory to the search path)

title: path - Add a directory to the beginning of the search path
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Add a directory to the beginning of the search path)

title: path - Clear the search path
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Clear the search path)

title: path - Display help
description: path: Display or set the search path for executable files. This command is available in `FreeDOS` only. (Display help)

title: rd - Remove directory
description: rd: Remove a directory. (Remove directory)

title: boot - Boot from floppy image
description: boot: Boot floppy or hard disk images directly, bypassing OS emulation. (Boot from floppy image)

title: boot - Boot from hard disk image
description: boot: Boot floppy or hard disk images directly, bypassing OS emulation. (Boot from hard disk image)

title: boot - Boot multiple floppy images
description: boot: Boot floppy or hard disk images directly, bypassing OS emulation. (Boot multiple floppy images)
